sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince optimal f method: requires minimum 5 years historical data for calculation. Expected equity retracements range 30-95% when applied across multiple market systems simultaneously. Formula and Kelly fraction not specified by author.

source_rule_text: Use at least 5 years of historical data to calculate optimal f, and expect 30% to 95% equity retracements when employing mathematically correct position sizing across market systems.
